subtitle.en: Specific planetary configurations that produce defined results  –  Raja, Dhana, Arishta, Nabhasa, and the Pancha Mahapurusha Yogas
subtitle.hi: विशिष्ट ग्रह विन्यास जो निश्चित फल उत्पन्न करते हैं  –  राज, धन, अरिष्ट, नाभस और पञ्च महापुरुष योग
subtitle.ta: கிரகங்களின் குறிப்பிட்ட நிலை சேர்க்கைகள் நற்பலன், தீய பலன் அளிக்கின்றன  –  ஜாதக யோக அடையாளம்
subtitle.te: గ్రహాల నిర్దిష్ట స్థాన సంయోగాలు శుభాశుభ ఫలితాలనిస్తాయి  –  జాతక యోగ గుర్తింపు
subtitle.bn: গ্রহের বিশেষ স্থান সংযোগ শুভাশুভ ফল দেয়  –  কুণ্ডলী যোগ চিহ্নিতকরণ
subtitle.kn: ಗ್ರಹಗಳ ನಿರ್ದಿಷ್ಟ ಸ್ಥಾನ ಸಂಯೋಗಗಳು ಶುಭಾಶುಭ ಫಲ ಕೊಡುತ್ತವೆ  –  ಕುಂಡಲಿ ಯೋಗ ಗುರುತಿಸುವಿಕೆ
subtitle.mr: ग्रहांच्या विशिष्ट स्थान संयोगामुळे शुभाशुभ फल मिळतात  –  कुंडली योग ओळख
subtitle.gu: ગ્રહોના વિશિષ્ટ સ્થાન સંયોગો શુભાશુભ ફળ આપે છે  –  કુંડળી યોગ ઓળખ
subtitle.mai: ग्रहक विशिष्ट स्थान संयोग शुभाशुभ फल दैत अछि  –  कुंडली योग पहचान

question.en: What fundamentally distinguishes Vedic "yogas" from Western "aspects"?
question.hi: वैदिक "योग" पश्चिमी "दृष्टि" से मूलभूत रूप से किस प्रकार भिन्न हैं?
question.ta: What fundamentally distinguishes Vedic "yogas" from Western "aspects"?
question.te: What fundamentally distinguishes Vedic "yogas" from Western "aspects"?
question.bn: What fundamentally distinguishes Vedic "yogas" from Western "aspects"?
question.kn: What fundamentally distinguishes Vedic "yogas" from Western "aspects"?
question.mr: वैदिक "योग" पश्चिमी "दृष्टि" से मूलभूत रूप से किस प्रकार भिन्न हैं?
question.gu: What fundamentally distinguishes Vedic "yogas" from Western "aspects"?
question.mai: की मौलिक रूप सँ वैदिक "योग" केँ पश्चिमी "दृष्टि" सँ भिन्न करैत अछि?

explanation.en: Vedic yogas are based on house lordship  –  which houses a planet rules based on the rising sign. A conjunction of the 9th and 10th lords forms a Raja Yoga regardless of the degree angle. Western aspects focus primarily on geometric angles (trine, square, opposition) between planets.
explanation.hi: वैदिक योग भाव स्वामित्व पर आधारित हैं  –  लग्न के अनुसार ग्रह किन भावों का स्वामी है। 9वें और 10वें भाव के स्वामियों का संयोग अंश कोण की परवाह किए बिना राज योग बनाता है। पश्चिमी दृष्टि मुख्यतः ग्रहों के बीच ज्यामितीय कोणों (त्रिकोण, वर्ग, सम्मुख) पर केन्द्रित है।
explanation.ta: Vedic yogas are based on house lordship  –  which houses a planet rules based on the rising sign. A conjunction of the 9th and 10th lords forms a Raja Yoga regardless of the degree angle. Western aspects focus primarily on geometric angles (trine, square, opposition) between planets.
explanation.te: Vedic yogas are based on house lordship  –  which houses a planet rules based on the rising sign. A conjunction of the 9th and 10th lords forms a Raja Yoga regardless of the degree angle. Western aspects focus primarily on geometric angles (trine, square, opposition) between planets.
explanation.bn: Vedic yogas are based on house lordship  –  which houses a planet rules based on the rising sign. A conjunction of the 9th and 10th lords forms a Raja Yoga regardless of the degree angle. Western aspects focus primarily on geometric angles (trine, square, opposition) between planets.
explanation.kn: Vedic yogas are based on house lordship  –  which houses a planet rules based on the rising sign. A conjunction of the 9th and 10th lords forms a Raja Yoga regardless of the degree angle. Western aspects focus primarily on geometric angles (trine, square, opposition) between planets.
explanation.mr: वैदिक योग भाव स्वामित्व पर आधारित हैं  –  लग्न के अनुसार ग्रह किन भावों का स्वामी है। 9वें और 10वें भाव के स्वामियों का संयोग अंश कोण की परवाह किए बिना राज योग बनाता है। पश्चिमी दृष्टि मुख्यतः ग्रहों के बीच ज्यामितीय कोणों (त्रिकोण, वर्ग, सम्मुख) पर केन्द्रित है।
explanation.gu: Vedic yogas are based on house lordship  –  which houses a planet rules based on the rising sign. A conjunction of the 9th and 10th lords forms a Raja Yoga regardless of the degree angle. Western aspects focus primarily on geometric angles (trine, square, opposition) between planets.
explanation.mai: वैदिक योग भावक स्वामित्व पर आधारित अछि – जे लग्नक आधार पर कोनो ग्रह कोन भावक स्वामी अछि. नवम ओ दशमेशक युति अंशक कोणक बावजूद एकटा राज योग बनबैत अछि. पश्चिमी दृष्टि मुख्य रूप सँ ग्रहक बीचक ज्यामितीय कोण (त्रिकोण, चतुष्कोण, प्रतिपक्षी) पर ध्यान केंद्रित करैत अछि.

question.en: Which of the following is NOT a major category of yogas?
question.hi: निम्नलिखित में से कौन-सी योगों की प्रमुख श्रेणी नहीं है?
question.ta: Which of the following is NOT a major category of yogas?
question.te: Which of the following is NOT a major category of yogas?
question.bn: Which of the following is NOT a major category of yogas?
question.kn: Which of the following is NOT a major category of yogas?
question.mr: निम्नलिखित में से कौन-सी योगों की प्रमुख श्रेणी नहीं है?
question.gu: Which of the following is NOT a major category of yogas?
question.mai: नीचा देल गेल मे सँ कोन योगक एकटा प्रमुख श्रेणी नहि अछि?

explanation.en: The major yoga categories are Raja (power), Dhana (wealth), Arishta (suffering/health), and Nabhasa (celestial patterns based on planetary distribution). "Grahan Yoga" is not a standard category  –  though Grahan (eclipse) affects doshas, it is not a yoga classification.
explanation.hi: प्रमुख योग श्रेणियाँ हैं: राज (शक्ति), धन (सम्पत्ति), अरिष्ट (कष्ट/स्वास्थ्य) और नाभस (ग्रह वितरण पर आधारित आकाशीय प्रतिमान)। "ग्रहण योग" मानक श्रेणी नहीं है  –  यद्यपि ग्रहण दोषों को प्रभावित करता है, यह योग वर्गीकरण नहीं है।
explanation.ta: The major yoga categories are Raja (power), Dhana (wealth), Arishta (suffering/health), and Nabhasa (celestial patterns based on planetary distribution). "Grahan Yoga" is not a standard category  –  though Grahan (eclipse) affects doshas, it is not a yoga classification.
explanation.te: The major yoga categories are Raja (power), Dhana (wealth), Arishta (suffering/health), and Nabhasa (celestial patterns based on planetary distribution). "Grahan Yoga" is not a standard category  –  though Grahan (eclipse) affects doshas, it is not a yoga classification.
explanation.bn: The major yoga categories are Raja (power), Dhana (wealth), Arishta (suffering/health), and Nabhasa (celestial patterns based on planetary distribution). "Grahan Yoga" is not a standard category  –  though Grahan (eclipse) affects doshas, it is not a yoga classification.
explanation.kn: The major yoga categories are Raja (power), Dhana (wealth), Arishta (suffering/health), and Nabhasa (celestial patterns based on planetary distribution). "Grahan Yoga" is not a standard category  –  though Grahan (eclipse) affects doshas, it is not a yoga classification.
explanation.mr: प्रमुख योग श्रेणियाँ हैं: राज (शक्ति), धन (सम्पत्ति), अरिष्ट (कष्ट/स्वास्थ्य) और नाभस (ग्रह वितरण पर आधारित आकाशीय प्रतिमान)। "ग्रहण योग" मानक श्रेणी नहीं है  –  यद्यपि ग्रहण दोषों को प्रभावित करता है, यह योग वर्गीकरण नहीं है।
explanation.gu: The major yoga categories are Raja (power), Dhana (wealth), Arishta (suffering/health), and Nabhasa (celestial patterns based on planetary distribution). "Grahan Yoga" is not a standard category  –  though Grahan (eclipse) affects doshas, it is not a yoga classification.
explanation.mai: प्रमुख योग श्रेणी अछि राज (शक्ति), धन (सम्पत्ति), अरिष्ट (कष्ट/स्वास्थ्य), ओ नभस (ग्रहक वितरण पर आधारित आकाशीय स्वरूप). "ग्रहण योग" एकटा मानक श्रेणी नहि अछि – यद्यपि ग्रहण (ग्रहण) दोष केँ प्रभावित करैत अछि, मुदा ई योगक वर्गीकरण नहि अछि.

question.en: Ruchaka Yoga  –  one of the Pancha Mahapurusha Yogas  –  is formed by:
question.hi: रुचक योग  –  पञ्च महापुरुष योगों में से एक  –  किससे बनता है?
question.ta: Ruchaka Yoga  –  one of the Pancha Mahapurusha Yogas  –  is formed by:
question.te: Ruchaka Yoga  –  one of the Pancha Mahapurusha Yogas  –  is formed by:
question.bn: Ruchaka Yoga  –  one of the Pancha Mahapurusha Yogas  –  is formed by:
question.kn: Ruchaka Yoga  –  one of the Pancha Mahapurusha Yogas  –  is formed by:
question.mr: रुचक योग  –  पञ्च महापुरुष योगों में से एक  –  किससे बनता है?
question.gu: Ruchaka Yoga  –  one of the Pancha Mahapurusha Yogas  –  is formed by:
question.mai: रुचिक योग – पंच महापुरुष योग मे सँ एकटा – बनैत अछि:

explanation.en: Ruchaka Yoga is formed when Mars occupies its own sign (Aries/Scorpio) or exaltation sign (Capricorn) in a Kendra house (1st, 4th, 7th, or 10th from Lagna or Moon). It produces a warrior-like personality  –  courageous, commanding, and physically strong.
explanation.hi: रुचक योग तब बनता है जब मंगल अपनी स्वराशि (मेष/वृश्चिक) या उच्च राशि (मकर) में केन्द्र भाव (लग्न या चन्द्र से 1, 4, 7 या 10वें) में हो। यह योद्धा जैसा व्यक्तित्व उत्पन्न करता है  –  साहसी, आदेशात्मक और शारीरिक रूप से बलवान।
explanation.ta: Ruchaka Yoga is formed when Mars occupies its own sign (Aries/Scorpio) or exaltation sign (Capricorn) in a Kendra house (1st, 4th, 7th, or 10th from Lagna or Moon). It produces a warrior-like personality  –  courageous, commanding, and physically strong.
explanation.te: Ruchaka Yoga is formed when Mars occupies its own sign (Aries/Scorpio) or exaltation sign (Capricorn) in a Kendra house (1st, 4th, 7th, or 10th from Lagna or Moon). It produces a warrior-like personality  –  courageous, commanding, and physically strong.
explanation.bn: Ruchaka Yoga is formed when Mars occupies its own sign (Aries/Scorpio) or exaltation sign (Capricorn) in a Kendra house (1st, 4th, 7th, or 10th from Lagna or Moon). It produces a warrior-like personality  –  courageous, commanding, and physically strong.
explanation.kn: Ruchaka Yoga is formed when Mars occupies its own sign (Aries/Scorpio) or exaltation sign (Capricorn) in a Kendra house (1st, 4th, 7th, or 10th from Lagna or Moon). It produces a warrior-like personality  –  courageous, commanding, and physically strong.
explanation.mr: रुचक योग तब बनता है जब मंगल अपनी स्वराशि (मेष/वृश्चिक) या उच्च राशि (मकर) में केन्द्र भाव (लग्न या चन्द्र से 1, 4, 7 या 10वें) में हो। यह योद्धा जैसा व्यक्तित्व उत्पन्न करता है  –  साहसी, आदेशात्मक और शारीरिक रूप से बलवान।
explanation.gu: Ruchaka Yoga is formed when Mars occupies its own sign (Aries/Scorpio) or exaltation sign (Capricorn) in a Kendra house (1st, 4th, 7th, or 10th from Lagna or Moon). It produces a warrior-like personality  –  courageous, commanding, and physically strong.
explanation.mai: रुचिक योग तखन बनैत अछि जखन मंगल अपन राशि (मेष/वृश्चिक) वा उच्च राशि (मकर) मे केन्द्र भाव (लग्न वा चन्द्रमा सँ पहिल, चौथा, सातमा, वा दसमा) मे होइत अछि. ई एकटा योद्धा-सन व्यक्तित्व उत्पन्न करैत अछि – साहसी, आज्ञाकारी, ओ शारीरिक रूप सँ बलवान.

question.en: Hamsa Yoga (one of the Pancha Mahapurusha) is formed by Jupiter in own or exalted sign in a Kendra.
question.hi: हंस योग (पञ्च महापुरुष में से एक) गुरु के स्वराशि या उच्च राशि में केन्द्र में होने से बनता है।
question.ta: Hamsa Yoga (one of the Pancha Mahapurusha) is formed by Jupiter in own or exalted sign in a Kendra.
question.te: Hamsa Yoga (one of the Pancha Mahapurusha) is formed by Jupiter in own or exalted sign in a Kendra.
question.bn: Hamsa Yoga (one of the Pancha Mahapurusha) is formed by Jupiter in own or exalted sign in a Kendra.
question.kn: Hamsa Yoga (one of the Pancha Mahapurusha) is formed by Jupiter in own or exalted sign in a Kendra.
question.mr: हंस योग (पञ्च महापुरुष में से एक) गुरु के स्वराशि या उच्च राशि में केन्द्र में होने से बनता है।
question.gu: Hamsa Yoga (one of the Pancha Mahapurusha) is formed by Jupiter in own or exalted sign in a Kendra.
question.mai: हंस योग (पंच महापुरुष मे सँ एकटा) बृहस्पति द्वारा अपन वा उच्च राशि मे केन्द्र मे बनैत अछि.

explanation.en: True. Hamsa Yoga forms when Jupiter occupies its own sign (Sagittarius/Pisces) or exaltation (Cancer) in a Kendra house. It bestows spiritual wisdom, righteousness, respect from authority, and a noble character  –  the "swan" personality that discriminates between the pure and impure.
explanation.hi: सत्य। हंस योग तब बनता है जब गुरु स्वराशि (धनु/मीन) या उच्च (कर्क) में केन्द्र भाव में हो। यह आध्यात्मिक ज्ञान, धार्मिकता, अधिकारियों से सम्मान और उत्तम चरित्र प्रदान करता है  –  "हंस" व्यक्तित्व जो शुद्ध और अशुद्ध में भेद करता है।
explanation.ta: True. Hamsa Yoga forms when Jupiter occupies its own sign (Sagittarius/Pisces) or exaltation (Cancer) in a Kendra house. It bestows spiritual wisdom, righteousness, respect from authority, and a noble character  –  the "swan" personality that discriminates between the pure and impure.
explanation.te: True. Hamsa Yoga forms when Jupiter occupies its own sign (Sagittarius/Pisces) or exaltation (Cancer) in a Kendra house. It bestows spiritual wisdom, righteousness, respect from authority, and a noble character  –  the "swan" personality that discriminates between the pure and impure.
explanation.bn: True. Hamsa Yoga forms when Jupiter occupies its own sign (Sagittarius/Pisces) or exaltation (Cancer) in a Kendra house. It bestows spiritual wisdom, righteousness, respect from authority, and a noble character  –  the "swan" personality that discriminates between the pure and impure.
explanation.kn: True. Hamsa Yoga forms when Jupiter occupies its own sign (Sagittarius/Pisces) or exaltation (Cancer) in a Kendra house. It bestows spiritual wisdom, righteousness, respect from authority, and a noble character  –  the "swan" personality that discriminates between the pure and impure.
explanation.mr: सत्य। हंस योग तब बनता है जब गुरु स्वराशि (धनु/मीन) या उच्च (कर्क) में केन्द्र भाव में हो। यह आध्यात्मिक ज्ञान, धार्मिकता, अधिकारियों से सम्मान और उत्तम चरित्र प्रदान करता है  –  "हंस" व्यक्तित्व जो शुद्ध और अशुद्ध में भेद करता है।
explanation.gu: True. Hamsa Yoga forms when Jupiter occupies its own sign (Sagittarius/Pisces) or exaltation (Cancer) in a Kendra house. It bestows spiritual wisdom, righteousness, respect from authority, and a noble character  –  the "swan" personality that discriminates between the pure and impure.
explanation.mai: सत्य. हंस योग तखन बनैत अछि जखन बृहस्पति अपन राशि (धनु/मीन) वा उच्च (कर्क) मे केन्द्र भाव मे होइत अछि. ई आध्यात्मिक ज्ञान, धार्मिकता, अधिकारी सँ सम्मान, ओ एकटा कुलीन चरित्र प्रदान करैत अछि – ओ "हंस" व्यक्तित्व जे शुद्ध ओ अशुद्धक बीच भेद करैत अछि.

question.en: Which Pancha Mahapurusha Yoga produces a scholar/intellectual personality?
question.hi: कौन-सा पञ्च महापुरुष योग विद्वान/बौद्धिक व्यक्तित्व उत्पन्न करता है?
question.ta: Which Pancha Mahapurusha Yoga produces a scholar/intellectual personality?
question.te: Which Pancha Mahapurusha Yoga produces a scholar/intellectual personality?
question.bn: Which Pancha Mahapurusha Yoga produces a scholar/intellectual personality?
question.kn: Which Pancha Mahapurusha Yoga produces a scholar/intellectual personality?
question.mr: कौन-सा पञ्च महापुरुष योग विद्वान/बौद्धिक व्यक्तित्व उत्पन्न करता है?
question.gu: Which Pancha Mahapurusha Yoga produces a scholar/intellectual personality?
question.mai: कोन पंच महापुरुष योग एकटा विद्वान/बौद्धिक व्यक्तित्व उत्पन्न करैत अछि?

explanation.en: Bhadra Yoga forms when Mercury is in its own sign (Gemini/Virgo) or exaltation (Virgo) in a Kendra. Mercury being the planet of intellect and communication, Bhadra natives are eloquent scholars, skilled writers, and sharp analysts with exceptional learning ability.
explanation.hi: भद्र योग तब बनता है जब बुध स्वराशि (मिथुन/कन्या) या उच्च (कन्या) में केन्द्र में हो। बुध बुद्धि और संचार का ग्रह होने से भद्र जातक वाक्पटु विद्वान, कुशल लेखक और तीक्ष्ण विश्लेषक होते हैं जिनमें असाधारण अधिगम क्षमता होती है।
explanation.ta: Bhadra Yoga forms when Mercury is in its own sign (Gemini/Virgo) or exaltation (Virgo) in a Kendra. Mercury being the planet of intellect and communication, Bhadra natives are eloquent scholars, skilled writers, and sharp analysts with exceptional learning ability.
explanation.te: Bhadra Yoga forms when Mercury is in its own sign (Gemini/Virgo) or exaltation (Virgo) in a Kendra. Mercury being the planet of intellect and communication, Bhadra natives are eloquent scholars, skilled writers, and sharp analysts with exceptional learning ability.
explanation.bn: Bhadra Yoga forms when Mercury is in its own sign (Gemini/Virgo) or exaltation (Virgo) in a Kendra. Mercury being the planet of intellect and communication, Bhadra natives are eloquent scholars, skilled writers, and sharp analysts with exceptional learning ability.
explanation.kn: Bhadra Yoga forms when Mercury is in its own sign (Gemini/Virgo) or exaltation (Virgo) in a Kendra. Mercury being the planet of intellect and communication, Bhadra natives are eloquent scholars, skilled writers, and sharp analysts with exceptional learning ability.
explanation.mr: भद्र योग तब बनता है जब बुध स्वराशि (मिथुन/कन्या) या उच्च (कन्या) में केन्द्र में हो। बुध बुद्धि और संचार का ग्रह होने से भद्र जातक वाक्पटु विद्वान, कुशल लेखक और तीक्ष्ण विश्लेषक होते हैं जिनमें असाधारण अधिगम क्षमता होती है।
explanation.gu: Bhadra Yoga forms when Mercury is in its own sign (Gemini/Virgo) or exaltation (Virgo) in a Kendra. Mercury being the planet of intellect and communication, Bhadra natives are eloquent scholars, skilled writers, and sharp analysts with exceptional learning ability.
explanation.mai: भद्र योग तखन बनैत अछि जखन बुध अपन राशि (मिथुन/कन्या) वा उच्च (कन्या) मे केन्द्र मे होइत अछि. बुध बुद्धि ओ संचारक ग्रह भेलाक कारणेँ, भद्र जातक वाक्पटु विद्वान, कुशल लेखक, ओ असाधारण सीखबाक क्षमताक संग तेज विश्लेषक होइत छथि.

question.en: A Raja Yoga is fundamentally formed by the conjunction or exchange of lords of:
question.hi: राज योग मूलतः किन स्वामियों के संयोग या विनिमय से बनता है?
question.ta: A Raja Yoga is fundamentally formed by the conjunction or exchange of lords of:
question.te: A Raja Yoga is fundamentally formed by the conjunction or exchange of lords of:
question.bn: A Raja Yoga is fundamentally formed by the conjunction or exchange of lords of:
question.kn: A Raja Yoga is fundamentally formed by the conjunction or exchange of lords of:
question.mr: राज योग मूलतः किन स्वामियों के संयोग या विनिमय से बनता है?
question.gu: A Raja Yoga is fundamentally formed by the conjunction or exchange of lords of:
question.mai: एकटा राज योग मौलिक रूप सँ स्वामीक युति वा विनिमय सँ बनैत अछि:

explanation.en: Raja Yogas are formed by the conjunction, mutual aspect, or exchange (Parivartana) of Kendra lords (1, 4, 7, 10) with Trikona lords (1, 5, 9). Kendra represents action/manifestation; Trikona represents dharma/fortune. Their union creates the "royal combination"  –  power with purpose.
explanation.hi: राज योग केन्द्र स्वामियों (1, 4, 7, 10) और त्रिकोण स्वामियों (1, 5, 9) के संयोग, परस्पर दृष्टि या विनिमय (परिवर्तन) से बनते हैं। केन्द्र कर्म/अभिव्यक्ति का प्रतिनिधि है; त्रिकोण धर्म/भाग्य का। इनका मिलन "राजकीय संयोग" बनाता है  –  उद्देश्य के साथ शक्ति।
explanation.ta: Raja Yogas are formed by the conjunction, mutual aspect, or exchange (Parivartana) of Kendra lords (1, 4, 7, 10) with Trikona lords (1, 5, 9). Kendra represents action/manifestation; Trikona represents dharma/fortune. Their union creates the "royal combination"  –  power with purpose.
explanation.te: Raja Yogas are formed by the conjunction, mutual aspect, or exchange (Parivartana) of Kendra lords (1, 4, 7, 10) with Trikona lords (1, 5, 9). Kendra represents action/manifestation; Trikona represents dharma/fortune. Their union creates the "royal combination"  –  power with purpose.
explanation.bn: Raja Yogas are formed by the conjunction, mutual aspect, or exchange (Parivartana) of Kendra lords (1, 4, 7, 10) with Trikona lords (1, 5, 9). Kendra represents action/manifestation; Trikona represents dharma/fortune. Their union creates the "royal combination"  –  power with purpose.
explanation.kn: Raja Yogas are formed by the conjunction, mutual aspect, or exchange (Parivartana) of Kendra lords (1, 4, 7, 10) with Trikona lords (1, 5, 9). Kendra represents action/manifestation; Trikona represents dharma/fortune. Their union creates the "royal combination"  –  power with purpose.
explanation.mr: राज योग केन्द्र स्वामियों (1, 4, 7, 10) और त्रिकोण स्वामियों (1, 5, 9) के संयोग, परस्पर दृष्टि या विनिमय (परिवर्तन) से बनते हैं। केन्द्र कर्म/अभिव्यक्ति का प्रतिनिधि है; त्रिकोण धर्म/भाग्य का। इनका मिलन "राजकीय संयोग" बनाता है  –  उद्देश्य के साथ शक्ति।
explanation.gu: Raja Yogas are formed by the conjunction, mutual aspect, or exchange (Parivartana) of Kendra lords (1, 4, 7, 10) with Trikona lords (1, 5, 9). Kendra represents action/manifestation; Trikona represents dharma/fortune. Their union creates the "royal combination"  –  power with purpose.
explanation.mai: राज योग केन्द्रेश (१, ४, ७, १०) क त्रिकोणेश (१, ५, ९) क संग युति, परस्पर दृष्टि, वा विनिमय (परिवर्तन) सँ बनैत अछि. केन्द्र कर्म/अभिव्यक्तिक प्रतिनिधित्व करैत अछि; त्रिकोण धर्म/भाग्यक प्रतिनिधित्व करैत अछि. हुनकर मिलन "शाही संयोजन" – उद्देश्यक संग शक्ति – बनबैत अछि.

question.en: The strongest Raja Yoga  –  Dharma-Karma Adhipati Yoga  –  is formed by:
question.hi: सबसे शक्तिशाली राज योग  –  धर्म-कर्म अधिपति योग  –  किससे बनता है?
question.ta: The strongest Raja Yoga  –  Dharma-Karma Adhipati Yoga  –  is formed by:
question.te: The strongest Raja Yoga  –  Dharma-Karma Adhipati Yoga  –  is formed by:
question.bn: The strongest Raja Yoga  –  Dharma-Karma Adhipati Yoga  –  is formed by:
question.kn: The strongest Raja Yoga  –  Dharma-Karma Adhipati Yoga  –  is formed by:
question.mr: सबसे शक्तिशाली राज योग  –  धर्म-कर्म अधिपति योग  –  किससे बनता है?
question.gu: The strongest Raja Yoga  –  Dharma-Karma Adhipati Yoga  –  is formed by:
question.mai: सबसँ शक्तिशाली राज योग – धर्म-कर्म अधिपति योग – बनैत अछि:

explanation.en: Dharma-Karma Adhipati Yoga is the conjunction or exchange of the 9th lord (supreme dharma/fortune) and 10th lord (supreme karma/action). This is considered the most powerful Raja Yoga because it unites the highest trikona (9th = bhagya) with the highest kendra (10th = karma).
explanation.hi: 9वें स्वामी (परम धर्म/भाग्य) और 10वें स्वामी (परम कर्म) का संयोग या विनिमय धर्म-कर्म अधिपति योग है। यह सबसे शक्तिशाली राज योग माना जाता है क्योंकि यह सर्वोच्च त्रिकोण (9वाँ = भाग्य) को सर्वोच्च केन्द्र (10वाँ = कर्म) से जोड़ता है।
explanation.ta: Dharma-Karma Adhipati Yoga is the conjunction or exchange of the 9th lord (supreme dharma/fortune) and 10th lord (supreme karma/action). This is considered the most powerful Raja Yoga because it unites the highest trikona (9th = bhagya) with the highest kendra (10th = karma).
explanation.te: Dharma-Karma Adhipati Yoga is the conjunction or exchange of the 9th lord (supreme dharma/fortune) and 10th lord (supreme karma/action). This is considered the most powerful Raja Yoga because it unites the highest trikona (9th = bhagya) with the highest kendra (10th = karma).
explanation.bn: Dharma-Karma Adhipati Yoga is the conjunction or exchange of the 9th lord (supreme dharma/fortune) and 10th lord (supreme karma/action). This is considered the most powerful Raja Yoga because it unites the highest trikona (9th = bhagya) with the highest kendra (10th = karma).
explanation.kn: Dharma-Karma Adhipati Yoga is the conjunction or exchange of the 9th lord (supreme dharma/fortune) and 10th lord (supreme karma/action). This is considered the most powerful Raja Yoga because it unites the highest trikona (9th = bhagya) with the highest kendra (10th = karma).
explanation.mr: 9वें स्वामी (परम धर्म/भाग्य) और 10वें स्वामी (परम कर्म) का संयोग या विनिमय धर्म-कर्म अधिपति योग है। यह सबसे शक्तिशाली राज योग माना जाता है क्योंकि यह सर्वोच्च त्रिकोण (9वाँ = भाग्य) को सर्वोच्च केन्द्र (10वाँ = कर्म) से जोड़ता है।
explanation.gu: Dharma-Karma Adhipati Yoga is the conjunction or exchange of the 9th lord (supreme dharma/fortune) and 10th lord (supreme karma/action). This is considered the most powerful Raja Yoga because it unites the highest trikona (9th = bhagya) with the highest kendra (10th = karma).
explanation.mai: धर्म-कर्म अधिपति योग नवमेश (सर्वोच्च धर्म/भाग्य) ओ दशमेश (सर्वोच्च कर्म/क्रिया) क युति वा विनिमय अछि. एकरा सबसँ शक्तिशाली राज योग मानल जाइत अछि किएक तँ ई सर्वोच्च त्रिकोण (नवम = भाग्य) केँ सर्वोच्च केन्द्र (दशम = कर्म) क संग जोड़ैत अछि.

question.en: A Raja Yoga automatically guarantees wealth and power regardless of dasha and transit.
question.hi: राज योग दशा और गोचर की परवाह किए बिना स्वतः धन और शक्ति की गारण्टी देता है।
question.ta: A Raja Yoga automatically guarantees wealth and power regardless of dasha and transit.
question.te: A Raja Yoga automatically guarantees wealth and power regardless of dasha and transit.
question.bn: A Raja Yoga automatically guarantees wealth and power regardless of dasha and transit.
question.kn: A Raja Yoga automatically guarantees wealth and power regardless of dasha and transit.
question.mr: राज योग दशा और गोचर की परवाह किए बिना स्वतः धन और शक्ति की गारण्टी देता है।
question.gu: A Raja Yoga automatically guarantees wealth and power regardless of dasha and transit.
question.mai: एकटा राज योग दशा ओ गोचरक बावजूद स्वतः धन ओ शक्ति क गारंटी दैत अछि.

explanation.en: False. A Raja Yoga is a promise in the chart, but it manifests only when activated by the appropriate dasha period (of one of the yoga-forming planets) and supported by favorable transits. An unactivated Raja Yoga remains dormant  –  potential without timing.
explanation.hi: असत्य। राज योग कुण्डली में एक वचन है, परन्तु यह तभी प्रकट होता है जब उचित दशा काल (योग बनाने वाले ग्रहों में से एक की) द्वारा सक्रिय हो और अनुकूल गोचर समर्थन करे। असक्रिय राज योग सुप्त रहता है  –  समय बिना सम्भावना।
explanation.ta: False. A Raja Yoga is a promise in the chart, but it manifests only when activated by the appropriate dasha period (of one of the yoga-forming planets) and supported by favorable transits. An unactivated Raja Yoga remains dormant  –  potential without timing.
explanation.te: False. A Raja Yoga is a promise in the chart, but it manifests only when activated by the appropriate dasha period (of one of the yoga-forming planets) and supported by favorable transits. An unactivated Raja Yoga remains dormant  –  potential without timing.
explanation.bn: False. A Raja Yoga is a promise in the chart, but it manifests only when activated by the appropriate dasha period (of one of the yoga-forming planets) and supported by favorable transits. An unactivated Raja Yoga remains dormant  –  potential without timing.
explanation.kn: False. A Raja Yoga is a promise in the chart, but it manifests only when activated by the appropriate dasha period (of one of the yoga-forming planets) and supported by favorable transits. An unactivated Raja Yoga remains dormant  –  potential without timing.
explanation.mr: असत्य। राज योग कुण्डली में एक वचन है, परन्तु यह तभी प्रकट होता है जब उचित दशा काल (योग बनाने वाले ग्रहों में से एक की) द्वारा सक्रिय हो और अनुकूल गोचर समर्थन करे। असक्रिय राज योग सुप्त रहता है  –  समय बिना सम्भावना।
explanation.gu: False. A Raja Yoga is a promise in the chart, but it manifests only when activated by the appropriate dasha period (of one of the yoga-forming planets) and supported by favorable transits. An unactivated Raja Yoga remains dormant  –  potential without timing.
explanation.mai: असत्य. एकटा राज योग कुण्डली मे एकटा वचन अछि, मुदा ई तखनहि प्रकट होइत अछि जखन उचित दशा अवधि (योग बनबयवला ग्रह मे सँ एकटा क) द्वारा सक्रिय होइत अछि ओ अनुकूल गोचर द्वारा समर्थित होइत अछि. एकटा निष्क्रिय राज योग सुप्त रहैत अछि – समयक बिना क्षमता.

question.en: Malavya Yoga (Pancha Mahapurusha) produces which type of personality?
question.hi: मालव्य योग (पञ्च महापुरुष) किस प्रकार का व्यक्तित्व उत्पन्न करता है?
question.ta: Malavya Yoga (Pancha Mahapurusha) produces which type of personality?
question.te: Malavya Yoga (Pancha Mahapurusha) produces which type of personality?
question.bn: Malavya Yoga (Pancha Mahapurusha) produces which type of personality?
question.kn: Malavya Yoga (Pancha Mahapurusha) produces which type of personality?
question.mr: मालव्य योग (पञ्च महापुरुष) किस प्रकार का व्यक्तित्व उत्पन्न करता है?
question.gu: Malavya Yoga (Pancha Mahapurusha) produces which type of personality?
question.mai: मालव्य योग (पंच महापुरुष) कोन प्रकारक व्यक्तित्व उत्पन्न करैत अछि?

explanation.en: Malavya Yoga forms when Venus is in its own sign (Taurus/Libra) or exaltation (Pisces) in a Kendra. Venus being the planet of beauty, art, and luxury, Malavya natives have refined taste, artistic talent, material comforts, and magnetic charm.
explanation.hi: मालव्य योग तब बनता है जब शुक्र स्वराशि (वृषभ/तुला) या उच्च (मीन) में केन्द्र में हो। शुक्र सौन्दर्य, कला और विलासिता का ग्रह होने से मालव्य जातक परिष्कृत रुचि, कलात्मक प्रतिभा, भौतिक सुख और आकर्षक व्यक्तित्व रखते हैं।
explanation.ta: Malavya Yoga forms when Venus is in its own sign (Taurus/Libra) or exaltation (Pisces) in a Kendra. Venus being the planet of beauty, art, and luxury, Malavya natives have refined taste, artistic talent, material comforts, and magnetic charm.
explanation.te: Malavya Yoga forms when Venus is in its own sign (Taurus/Libra) or exaltation (Pisces) in a Kendra. Venus being the planet of beauty, art, and luxury, Malavya natives have refined taste, artistic talent, material comforts, and magnetic charm.
explanation.bn: Malavya Yoga forms when Venus is in its own sign (Taurus/Libra) or exaltation (Pisces) in a Kendra. Venus being the planet of beauty, art, and luxury, Malavya natives have refined taste, artistic talent, material comforts, and magnetic charm.
explanation.kn: Malavya Yoga forms when Venus is in its own sign (Taurus/Libra) or exaltation (Pisces) in a Kendra. Venus being the planet of beauty, art, and luxury, Malavya natives have refined taste, artistic talent, material comforts, and magnetic charm.
explanation.mr: मालव्य योग तब बनता है जब शुक्र स्वराशि (वृषभ/तुला) या उच्च (मीन) में केन्द्र में हो। शुक्र सौन्दर्य, कला और विलासिता का ग्रह होने से मालव्य जातक परिष्कृत रुचि, कलात्मक प्रतिभा, भौतिक सुख और आकर्षक व्यक्तित्व रखते हैं।
explanation.gu: Malavya Yoga forms when Venus is in its own sign (Taurus/Libra) or exaltation (Pisces) in a Kendra. Venus being the planet of beauty, art, and luxury, Malavya natives have refined taste, artistic talent, material comforts, and magnetic charm.
explanation.mai: मालव्य योग तखन बनैत अछि जखन शुक्र अपन राशि (वृषभ/तुला) वा उच्च (मीन) मे केन्द्र मे होइत अछि. शुक्र सुन्दरता, कला, ओ विलासिताक ग्रह भेलाक कारणेँ, मालव्य जातक मे परिष्कृत रुचि, कलात्मक प्रतिभा, भौतिक सुख, ओ आकर्षक आकर्षण होइत अछि.

options.en: Artist, lover of luxury, and refined aesthetic sense

question.en: How many possible Kendra-Trikona lord combinations can form Raja Yogas?
question.hi: केन्द्र-त्रिकोण स्वामी संयोगों से कितने राज योग सम्भव हैं?
question.ta: How many possible Kendra-Trikona lord combinations can form Raja Yogas?
question.te: How many possible Kendra-Trikona lord combinations can form Raja Yogas?
question.bn: How many possible Kendra-Trikona lord combinations can form Raja Yogas?
question.kn: How many possible Kendra-Trikona lord combinations can form Raja Yogas?
question.mr: केन्द्र-त्रिकोण स्वामी संयोगों से कितने राज योग सम्भव हैं?
question.gu: How many possible Kendra-Trikona lord combinations can form Raja Yogas?
question.mai: केटाटा केन्द्र-त्रिकोण स्वामीक संयोजन राज योग बनबैत अछि?

explanation.en: The 7 major Raja Yoga combinations are: 1st+5th, 1st+9th, 4th+5th, 4th+9th, 7th+5th, 7th+9th, 10th+5th, 10th+9th lords. The 1st lord is both Kendra and Trikona, making combinations with 5th or 9th especially potent. The strongest is 9th+10th (Dharma-Karma Adhipati).
explanation.hi: 7 प्रमुख राज योग संयोग हैं: 1+5, 1+9, 4+5, 4+9, 7+5, 7+9, 10+5, 10+9 भाव स्वामी। 1ला स्वामी केन्द्र और त्रिकोण दोनों है, 5वें या 9वें के साथ संयोग विशेष शक्तिशाली बनाता है। सबसे बलवान 9+10 (धर्म-कर्म अधिपति) है।
explanation.ta: The 7 major Raja Yoga combinations are: 1st+5th, 1st+9th, 4th+5th, 4th+9th, 7th+5th, 7th+9th, 10th+5th, 10th+9th lords. The 1st lord is both Kendra and Trikona, making combinations with 5th or 9th especially potent. The strongest is 9th+10th (Dharma-Karma Adhipati).
explanation.te: The 7 major Raja Yoga combinations are: 1st+5th, 1st+9th, 4th+5th, 4th+9th, 7th+5th, 7th+9th, 10th+5th, 10th+9th lords. The 1st lord is both Kendra and Trikona, making combinations with 5th or 9th especially potent. The strongest is 9th+10th (Dharma-Karma Adhipati).
explanation.bn: The 7 major Raja Yoga combinations are: 1st+5th, 1st+9th, 4th+5th, 4th+9th, 7th+5th, 7th+9th, 10th+5th, 10th+9th lords. The 1st lord is both Kendra and Trikona, making combinations with 5th or 9th especially potent. The strongest is 9th+10th (Dharma-Karma Adhipati).
explanation.kn: The 7 major Raja Yoga combinations are: 1st+5th, 1st+9th, 4th+5th, 4th+9th, 7th+5th, 7th+9th, 10th+5th, 10th+9th lords. The 1st lord is both Kendra and Trikona, making combinations with 5th or 9th especially potent. The strongest is 9th+10th (Dharma-Karma Adhipati).
explanation.mr: 7 प्रमुख राज योग संयोग हैं: 1+5, 1+9, 4+5, 4+9, 7+5, 7+9, 10+5, 10+9 भाव स्वामी। 1ला स्वामी केन्द्र और त्रिकोण दोनों है, 5वें या 9वें के साथ संयोग विशेष शक्तिशाली बनाता है। सबसे बलवान 9+10 (धर्म-कर्म अधिपति) है।
explanation.gu: The 7 major Raja Yoga combinations are: 1st+5th, 1st+9th, 4th+5th, 4th+9th, 7th+5th, 7th+9th, 10th+5th, 10th+9th lords. The 1st lord is both Kendra and Trikona, making combinations with 5th or 9th especially potent. The strongest is 9th+10th (Dharma-Karma Adhipati).
explanation.mai: ७ प्रमुख राज योग संयोजन अछि: प्रथमेश+पंचमेश, प्रथमेश+नवमेश, चतुर्थेश+पंचमेश, चतुर्थेश+नवमेश, सप्तमेश+पंचमेश, सप्तमेश+नवमेश, दशमेश+पंचमेश, दशमेश+नवमेश. प्रथमेश केन्द्र ओ त्रिकोण दुनूक स्वामी होइत अछि, जाहि सँ पंचमेश वा नवमेशक संग संयोजन विशेष रूप सँ शक्तिशाली होइत अछि. सबसँ शक्तिशाली नवमेश+दशमेश (धर्म-कर्म अधिपति) अछि.

question.en: What is the total duration of the Vimshottari Dasha cycle?
question.hi: विंशोत्तरी दशा चक्र की कुल अवधि क्या है?
question.ta: What is the total Vimshottari Dasha cycle?
question.te: What is the total Vimshottari Dasha cycle?
question.bn: What is the total Vimshottari Dasha cycle?
question.kn: What is the total Vimshottari Dasha cycle?
question.mr: विंशोत्तरी दशा चक्र की कुल अवधि क्या है?
question.gu: What is the total Vimshottari Dasha cycle?
question.mai: विंशोत्तरी दशा चक्रक कुल अवधि केटाटा अछि?

explanation.en: The Vimshottari Dasha totals 120 years (6+10+7+18+16+19+17+7+20), representing a full human lifespan in Vedic tradition.

question.en: A yoga that appears in the birth chart always delivers its full result regardless of dasha timing.
question.hi: जन्म कुण्डली में दिखने वाला योग दशा के समय की परवाह किए बिना सदैव पूर्ण फल देता है।
question.ta: A yoga in the birth chart always delivers its full result.
question.te: A yoga in the birth chart always delivers its full result.
question.bn: A yoga in the birth chart always delivers its full result.
question.kn: A yoga in the birth chart always delivers its full result.
question.mr: जन्म कुण्डली में दिखने वाला योग सदैव पूर्ण फल देता है।
question.gu: A yoga in the birth chart always delivers its full result.
question.mai: जन्म कुण्डली में दिखने वाला योग सदैव पूर्ण फल देता है।

explanation.en: A yoga remains a latent promise until the dasha of one of its forming planets arrives. Without dasha activation, even a powerful yoga may never fully manifest.
explanation.hi: योग एक अप्रकट प्रतिज्ञा बना रहता है जब तक उसके निर्माता ग्रहों में से एक की दशा न आए।
explanation.ta: A yoga remains latent until the dasha of its forming planet arrives.
explanation.te: A yoga remains latent until the dasha of its forming planet arrives.
explanation.bn: A yoga remains latent until the dasha of its forming planet arrives.
explanation.kn: A yoga remains latent until the dasha of its forming planet arrives.
explanation.mr: योग तब तक अप्रकट प्रतिज्ञा बना रहता है जब तक उसके निर्माता ग्रह की दशा न आए।
explanation.gu: A yoga remains latent until the dasha of its forming planet arrives.
explanation.mai: योग तब तक अप्रकट प्रतिज्ञा बना रहता है जब तक उसके निर्माता ग्रह की दशा न आए।

question.en: What happens when a debilitated planet's debilitation is cancelled (Neechabhanga)?
question.hi: जब नीच ग्रह का नीचभंग हो जाए तो क्या होता है?
question.ta: What happens when debilitation is cancelled?
question.te: What happens when debilitation is cancelled?
question.bn: What happens when debilitation is cancelled?
question.kn: What happens when debilitation is cancelled?
question.mr: नीचभंग होने पर क्या होता है?
question.gu: What happens when debilitation is cancelled?
question.mai: नीचभंग होने पर क्या होता है?

explanation.en: Neechabhanga Raja Yoga transforms a debilitated planet into a source of unexpected power and success  –  the cancellation converts weakness into strength.
explanation.hi: नीचभंग राजयोग नीच ग्रह को अप्रत्याशित शक्ति और सफलता का स्रोत बना देता है।
explanation.ta: Neechabhanga Raja Yoga transforms weakness into strength.
explanation.te: Neechabhanga Raja Yoga transforms weakness into strength.
explanation.bn: Neechabhanga Raja Yoga transforms weakness into strength.
explanation.kn: Neechabhanga Raja Yoga transforms weakness into strength.
explanation.mr: नीचभंग राजयोग नीच ग्रह को शक्ति का स्रोत बना देता है।
explanation.gu: Neechabhanga Raja Yoga transforms weakness into strength.
explanation.mai: नीचभंग राजयोग नीच ग्रह को शक्ति का स्रोत बना देता है।

options.hi: ग्रह और भी कमज़ोर हो जाता है

options.en: It transforms into Raja Yoga  –  unexpected power from weakness
options.hi: यह राजयोग में परिवर्तित होता है  –  कमज़ोरी से अप्रत्याशित शक्ति
options.mr: यह राजयोग में परिवर्तित होता है
options.mai: यह राजयोग में परिवर्तित होता है
